title: Triumph: Jesse Owens and the Berlin Olympics
original_title: Triumph: Jesse Owens and the Berlin Olympics
overview: Follows the 1936 Berlin Olympics when Black athlete Jesse Owens won 4 golds against the backdrop of Hitler's racist Nazi regime in Germany.
